title: mimosa distans subsp. elongata
intro: Mimosa distans subsp. elongata, also known as sensitive plant, is a perennial legume native to South America, characterized by its sensitive leaves that fold when touched. Traditionally, Mimosa distans subsp. elongata has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Mimosa distans subsp. elongata include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its potential benefits.
